title: UI/UX improvements

type.name: Feature
type.description: A request, idea, or new functionality

body: We need to make sure we support dark and light themes, and these are automatically detected. Also we need to support UI languages for English, Russian, Chinese, Hindi, and do auto detection of languages. Also these data about user should go to the agent context, and also to issue reporting. We might also try to deduce the location of the user. For i18n we should use https://github.com/link-foundation/lino-i18n if it has any missing features we need, we need to report issues there. Also we need to switch to emoji only buttons sooner: And we need to switch as soon as buttons are all still single line, but fee space ends, and no more room to fit them: We need to collect data related about the issue to this repository, make sure we compile that data to `./docs/case-studies/issue-{id}` folder, and use it to do deep case study analysis (also make sure to search online for additional facts and data), list of each and all requirements from the issue, and propose possible solutions and solution plans for each requirement (we should also check known existing components/libraries, that solve similar problem or can help in solutions). Please plan and execute everything in a single pull request, you have unlimited time and context, as context auto-compacts and you can continue indefinitely, until it is each and every requirement fully addressed, and everything is totally done.
